text:
The web search found a PDF hosted at UC Davis (anson.ucdavis.edu, which is Hans-Georg Müller's institutional page) with the title "Time Ordering of Gene Co-expression" and author "Xiaoyan Leng," matching the cited authors X. Leng and H.-G. Müller.

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: A paper titled "Time Ordering of Gene Co-expression" by Xiaoyan Leng and H.-G. Müller was found on Müller's UC Davis institutional page, matching both the title and authors of the cited reference. The 2006 Biostatistics venue is also consistent with the paper's content and formatting.
LINK: https://anson.ucdavis.edu/~mueller/biostatistics2-14.pdf
